message:
perf(stream,service,combinator): #[inline] terminal stream ops + select + service wrappers

Add #[inline] to: Peekable::poll_next, Next::poll, Collect::poll,
Fold::poll, ForEach::poll, Count::poll, Select::poll, SelectAll::poll,
Ready::poll, Timeout::poll_ready/call, LoadShed::poll_ready.

These are the remaining stream terminal operations and the most common
service middleware hot paths in every request pipeline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
